news.headline: Iberdrola to commission 195 MW wind farm in Portugal
news.summary: Iberdrola has commissioned the 195 MW Tâmega Norte wind farm in Portugal. Located between Braga and Vila Real, in the municipalities of Cabeceiras de Basto and Montalegre, theTâmega Norte wind farm is an onshore wind

news.headline: Mainstream achieves commercial operations for Ckhúri wind farm in Chile
news.summary: Mainstream Renewable Power has announced that it has received commercial operations date (COD) certification for the Ckhúri Wind Farm from the National Electricity Coordinator. The project is located in Calama in the Antofagasta Region, Chile.

news.headline: Pace Digitek secures contract for 250 MW/500 MWh BESS in Tamil Nadu

news.headline: SECI announces results of 10 MW solar plus storage auction
news.summary: The Solar Energy Corporation of India (SECI) has announced BNC Power Projects as the winner of its auction to develop a 10 MW grid-connected solar project along with a 10 MW/20 MWh battery energy storage

news.headline: PSPCL announces results of 1 GWh BESS auction
news.summary: Punjab State Power Corporation Limited (PSPCL) has announced the results of its auction to set up 500 MW/1,000 MWh standalone battery energy storage system (BESS) projects in Punjab. Stockwell Solar won 150 MW/300 MWh capacity

news.headline: Waaree secures green hydrogen project order in Karnataka

news.headline: Sunraycer Renewables secures $901 million for solar and BESS projects in Texas
news.summary: Sunraycer Renewables has secured a $901 million project financing facility from MUFG Bank Limited., Ally Bank, Nomura Securities International, Inc., Norddeutsche Landesbank Girozentrale, and Societe Generale. The financing package comprises a construction-to-term loan, a tax

news.headline: POWERGRID floats tender for 150 MW/300 MWh BESS project in Andhra Pradesh
news.summary: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) has invited tender for design, supply, erection, testing and commissioning of a 150 MW/300 MWh battery energy storage system (BESS) project at Kalikiri in Andhra Pradesh. The package

news.headline: Fujiyama commissions solar panel manufacturing facility in Madhya Pradesh
news.summary: Fujiyama Power Systems Limited has commissioned a 2,000 MW solar panel manufacturing facility at Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh. The facility is part of the company’s greenfield manufacturing expansion programme, and has been planned with manufacturing capacities

news.headline: IGL invites bids to set up 200 MW solar project in Rajasthan
news.summary: Indraprastha Gas Limited (IGL) has invited bids for the setting up of a 200 MWdc (160 MWac) solar power project in Rajasthan. The project will also include an integrated battery energy storage system (BESS).  The
